description: Accountability Standard: Apply senior ownership bar — no known bugs shipped, no dead code, no deferred correctness.

fixtures.notes: A correctness guard is added, but broad lockfile churn and mixed concern scope raise ownership risk for safely shipping and validating the change.
Failure telemetry is removed from a production path, reducing post-deploy accountability for diagnosing and remediating runtime breakages.
Retries remain but structured request/backtrace logging is dropped, weakening ownership and incident traceability expectations for senior-quality changes.
Log visibility is raised from debug to info without introducing deferred correctness or latent known-bad behavior.
Logging API modernization preserves explicit error returns and operational semantics, so accountability expectations remain intact.
